tools.name: Buffer
tools.keyFeatures: Post scheduling, analytics, AI assistant, multi-platform publishing
tools.recommendReason: Save 5-10 hrs/week on social media management

tools.name: Sprout Social
tools.keyFeatures: Publishing, analytics, social listening, CRM integration, approvals
tools.recommendReason: Agency-level social management (too expensive for most HK SMEs)

tools.name: Ahrefs
tools.function: SEO toolkit with best backlink database
tools.keyFeatures: Industry-leading backlink analysis, keyword research, site audit, rank tracking
tools.recommendReason: Essential for serious SEO; best backlink data. Shut down affiliate program.

tools.name: Klaviyo
tools.keyFeatures: Advanced segmentation, predictive analytics, deep Shopify/WooCommerce integration
tools.recommendReason: Up to 25x ROI on email marketing for e-commerce. Gold standard.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.keyFeatures: Highest-quality AI images, Discord + web interface, V7 model

tools.name: DALL-E / OpenAI
tools.pricingHKD: Via ChatGPT Plus HKD 156/mo; Pro HKD 1,560/mo
tools.keyFeatures: Text-to-image integrated into ChatGPT, image editing capabilities
tools.recommendReason: Eliminate need for basic graphic design freelancers

tools.name: Runway ML
tools.pricingHKD: Free (125 credits); Standard HKD 117/mo; Pro HKD 273/mo
tools.keyFeatures: Gen-4 video generation, text/image-to-video, motion tracking

tools.name: Trello
tools.keyFeatures: Boards/lists/cards, Butler automation, Atlassian Intelligence, Power-Ups
tools.recommendReason: Free tier sufficient for teams under 10

tools.name: Zapier
tools.keyFeatures: 7,000+ app integrations, AI actions, Tables, multi-step workflows

tools.name: Bardeen AI
tools.keyFeatures: Chrome extension, data scraping, AI-powered natural language workflows
tools.recommendReason: Eliminate manual data entry and web research

tools.name: Intercom
tools.keyFeatures: Fin AI Agent ($0.99/resolution), live chat, help center, proactive messaging
tools.recommendReason: Fin AI resolves at $0.99 vs $5-15 per human interaction

tools.name: Zendesk AI
tools.keyFeatures: AI agents, agent copilot, omnichannel support, 1,000+ integrations

tools.name: Fathom
tools.keyFeatures: Unlimited free recording/transcription, AI summaries, action items, CRM integration
tools.recommendReason: Save 30-60 min per meeting on note-taking. Best free meeting AI.

tools.name: Wave Accounting
tools.keyFeatures: Free invoicing, bank connections, reporting, receipt OCR, payroll add-on
tools.recommendReason: Save $200-500/yr vs paid accounting software. Zero-cost for micro-businesses.
